commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `formatSuppressedReplyPayloadForLog` to expand the suppressed final-reply `textPreview` slice from 160 to 500 characters.

PR surface: Source 0. Total 0 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main reproduces the linked bug because Slack and Microsoft Teams still enqueue a 160-character body preview into `System:` event text while the full body travels separately.
